overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban commercial district. The player character moves from a street with a 'NO-TELL' motel past vending machines and billboards, through covered walkways with vegetation planters, into an open plaza with food stalls, and finally back to street level under an overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with motel and vending machines

events.description: begins walking forward from the crosswalk past the NO-TELL motel
turning left into covered walkway away from main street

agents.ego_description: walking past the NO-TELL motel and purple vending machines along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blue hair walking past the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: neon sign for NO-TELL motel with purple and cyan lighting
large digital billboard displaying advertisement with pink neon graphics
purple and red automated vending machines with glowing displays
futuristic orange seating pods along the building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a neon-lit urban street at night, featuring the prominent NO-TELL motel sign and large digital billboards. The camera moves forward past purple vending machines and orange benches, with a pedestrian passing by, before turning left into a covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with neon accent lighting

events.description: entering covered walkway with vertical light panels and neon edge lighting
transitioning from yellow neon to purple neon lit section of corridor

agents.ego_description: turning left into a covered corridor and walking past vertical light installations and planters

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead in the covered corridor

entered.detail: tall illuminated rectangular panels with warm yellow light
rectangular planters with tropical plants and integrated bench seating
continuous yellow neon strips along building edges and corners

segments.scene_description: The camera turns into a covered walkway sheltered from the sky, characterized by vertical light panels and yellow neon edge lighting. The corridor features planter boxes with vegetation on the right, while the previous street elements fade from view behind the turn.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional walkway with dense vegetation planters leading to plaza

events.description: slight right turn while passing illuminated vegetation planters
emerging from narrow corridor into open plaza area with food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through corridor lined with dense vegetation planters, approaching an open plaza with a large vertical billboard visible ahead

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench next to illuminated planter box

entered.detail: tall digital screen displaying advertisement with female figure in bright lighting
food vendor stall with purple neon lighting and circular seating arrangements

segments.scene_description: Walking through a transitional space with moderate vegetation in planters and mixed lighting, the camera approaches an open plaza. A large vertical billboard becomes visible in the distance, while a person sits on a bench beside the planters.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with food stalls and neon lighting

events.description: slowing pace to observe surroundings while passing food stalls
turning to exit plaza through covered passage under overpass

agents.ego_description: exploring the open plaza, passing between food stalls with purple and cyan neon lighting

notable_agents.action: vendor standing near purple neon food stall with circular seating
person with red hair walking through the plaza

entered.detail: traditional-style food stall with cyan neon lighting and counter seating
futuristic circular seating pods with purple neon accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza filled with neon-lit food stalls, including a purple-lit stall and a cyan ramen stall. The area features circular neon benches and moderate crowds, with the camera exploring the space before turning toward an exit under an overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under overpass returning to street level

events.description: exiting dark overpass into brighter street lighting with visible billboards
approaching street level with vehicle headlights visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass and emerging back onto the main street with digital billboards

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on visible in the distance under the overpass

entered.detail: large concrete and metal overpass with yellow structural lighting and support columns
digital advertising screens at street level displaying various advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a covered walkway beneath a massive overpass structure, transitioning from the plaza back to street level. The lighting shifts from neon to artificial street lighting as the camera approaches the road where vehicle headlights are visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit urban street into a sheltered walkway that eventually opens into a wide plaza. It begins by gliding past the glowing NO-TELL motel sign and large digital billboards, moving past purple vending machines and orange benches before turning left. As the camera enters a covered walkway, the open night sky is replaced by a ceiling of vertical light panels and yellow neon edge lighting. The scene then shifts through a transitional corridor lined with vegetation in planter boxes, passing a seated pedestrian as the enclosed space gradually expands. Finally, the perspective opens up toward a spacious plaza dominated by a large vertical billboard in the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit commercial plaza toward the industrial atmosphere of a city street. It begins by exploring a wide open space filled with glowing food stalls in shades of purple and cyan, weaving past circular neon benches and moderate crowds. As the camera turns away from the plaza, the scene shifts into a covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. The lighting then transitions from the saturated neon glow of the market to the stark artificial light of the street level. Finally, the movement concludes as the camera approaches the open road, where the distant headlights of vehicles emerge through the urban gloom.
